author: Infragistics
name: Blazor Web App (IgniteUI)
description: A project template for creating a Blazor Web App that uses Ignite UI for Blazor (Lite) components. Choose Server, WebAssembly, or Auto hosting, and one of four IgniteUI theme variants.
symbols/Hosting/description: Interactivity hosting model. Server runs components on the server via SignalR. Wasm runs components in the browser via WebAssembly with a thin server host. Auto starts on the server, then transitions to WebAssembly once the .Client bundle is downloaded.
symbols/Variant/description: The light or dark color variant of the chosen theme.
symbols/IncludeWeatherSample/description: Include the Weather page (IgbGridLite + ApexCharts demo) and its supporting model/service.
symbols/SkipRestore/displayName: Do not restore the project on create
symbols/SkipRestore/description: If specified, skips the automatic restore of the project on create.
postActions/restore/description: Restore NuGet packages required by this project.
